summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Santa Gadea native chatbot implementation. Backend API working perfectly with mock fallback. Frontend chat interface functional with tabs, markdown rendering, and proper integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay interferes with ChatDock button click

passed_tests: API /api/onyx-chat responds with mock Santa Gadea data
Chat native page loads with tabs (Chat Nativo / Iframe Onyx)
User can type message and send via Enter key
Bot responds with formatted markdown (bold, lists)
Mock response includes fiestas info (14-17 agosto)
Quick suggestion buttons work (¿Cuándo son las fiestas?)
ChatDock floating button appears on non-chatbot pages
ChatDock is hidden on /chatbot page to avoid conflicts
Tab switching between Chat Nativo and Iframe Onyx
